rationale: The prior attempt only re-stated the six top-level conjuncts of `HostState::next_ensures`, leaving the three per-index `forall|i| ... ev@.{recvs,clocks,sends}[i] ...` quantifiers from `EventResults::well_typed_events` buried behind a `well_typed_events(ev1@)` / `well_typed_events(ev2@)` term, so their triggers were never instantiated side-by-side for the two runs. I keep the conjunct-level re-statements and additionally unfold the three inner `forall`s plus the `event_seq = recvs+clocks+sends` equation for both runs, then collect everything into a joint summary assertion so z3 sees identically-shaped trigger terms for r1 and r2 at the same proof site.
